products.name: Epic Mid-Back Bonded Leather Task Chair
products.description_short: Multi-function task chair with soft faux leather, height-adjustable back and arms, seat slider included. BIFMA certified.
specs: Tilt lock & independent back angle adjustment

Seat slider available as optional upgrade

Synchronous back and seat adjustment with lock

products.description_short: Stationary glides compatible with most office chairs as a replacement for casters. Set of 5.
